name: teacher-screen
description: Static classroom screen and projector display for teachers.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:structure
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run check:smoke
scripts.check:syntax: node --check js/index.js && node --check js/main.js && node --check js/projector.js && node --check js/utils/layout-manager.js && node --check js/utils/theme-manager.js && node --check js/utils/widget-picker-renderer.js && node --check js/services/state-manager.js && node --check js/widgets/widget-registry.js
